title: Classified Correspondence Markings
plain_language_rule: Correspondence must bear classification markings centered at the top and bottom of each page. Refer to SECNAV M-5510.30 and DoDM 5200.01 Vol 3 for detailed classification marking requirements.
source_text: Classification markings must be on the top and bottom center of each page. Follow SECNAV M-5510.30 and DoDM 5200.01 Vol 3 for classification marking requirements.
renderer_impact: Classification markings must be rendered centered (top and bottom) on every page. The specific marking text and formatting are governed by SECNAV M-5510.30 and DoDM 5200.01 Vol 3, not by this rule.
notes: The manual explicitly defers classification marking content and format to SECNAV M-5510.30 and DoDM 5200.01 Vol 3. This rule captures only the Chapter 7 requirement that markings must appear centered at top and bottom of each page. Detailed marking rules (text, format, specific positioning) are external to Chapter 7.
